titleStmt.title: SII 31.141: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 141. (A.R. No. B 280 of 1938.) SAMBAṬŪRU KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of a shrine on the north side of the Chennakēśava temple.

It is dated in the cyclic year Rudhirōdgāri, Kārthīka, śu. 10, Since the reigning period of this chief falls in between, 1588 A.D. and 1602 A.D. the given year correspondings to October 26, Tuesday, A.D.

It states that Raghunāthayya, the kāryakarta of the king has donated the waste land (biḍu) for cultivation to the kāmpus of Animela at the rate of 92 guttas per acre for about seven years continuosly. It also records the remission of taxes called kānike, asavechham (dasavanda ?) and davasāyi to the government for these seven years.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . rudhirōdgārisaṁvatsarakārtika śu 10 . lu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara maṭli komāra Ana
ṁtarājayyadēva cōḍamahārājulayyavāri kāryakatarlaIna Animela raghunādhayyagāru saṁ
baṭūri kāṁpulaku yicina vevasāyapu sāgubaḍi śāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu saṁbaṭūri polaṁ kuṁdara bīḷlu du
ṁnēṭaṁdulaku sāgubaḍi Icina vivaraṁ . cēnu 1ki gurtta 2 lekhanu duṁnina saṁvatsaraṁ Ārabhyaṁgānu yī
mariyādanu yēḍu yēṁḍla dākānu tapaka naḍapagalavāraṁ . yenimidō yēṁṭki gaṁṭaguruḍu yepū
rvastaḷa mariyādanu gtukōrlu(guttakōyi .) peṭa galavāru . bīṭagtunaḍice yēḍu yēṁḍladāṁkānu kāniki Asaveccaṁ nēla
baḍi kōṭa vavasāyi mānivāraṁ . yiṁduku tappaka naḍipiṁcagalavāraṁ māmāṭa naṁmni vilvigānu bīḷlu du
ṁnnukoni sukhāna bratikēdi . yiṁdulku yavaru tappikōṁnānu . gaṁgakaṭanu gōṁbrāhmaṁṇavadhi ṁcina pā
pāla pōvuvāru . yiṭini vēyiṁcna sāgubaḍi śāsanaṁ . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrījēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 31.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
